title: schoepfia haitiensis
intro: Schoepfia haitiensis, also known as Haitian tree, is a plant species native to the Caribbean and Central America, belonging to the family Olacaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Schoepfia haitiensis is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and in some cases, it is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or salve.
